name: ssot-rtl
description: SSOT->RTL seed template. The authoritative ledger is dynamic and must be derived from <ip>/rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json. The UI TodoTracker loads a flat one-to-one ledger projection from <ip>/rtl/rtl_todo_tracker.json so existing TodoTracker execution can advance one RTL ledger task at a time. Do not use fixed IP templates or stop at these seed tasks.

tasks.content: [SSOT->RTL] Regenerate and load the dynamic SSOT-derived RTL TODO plan
tasks.detail: Run/read <ip>/rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json generated by workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/derive_rtl_todos.py, then load <ip>/rtl/rtl_todo_tracker.json into the existing TodoTracker. Treat rtl_todo_plan.json as the full SSOT-derived implementation/evidence ledger. Treat rtl_todo_tracker.json as the active flat checklist: one TodoTracker task per ledger row, with source_ref, owner, criteria, and current audit status preserved in detail/criteria. The fixed template is not the work breakdown.
tasks.criteria:
rtl_todo_plan.json exists and was generated from the current SSOT
rtl_todo_tracker.json exists and was loaded into the active TodoTracker
rtl_todo_tracker.json source_task_count matches the full ledger task count
rtl_todo_tracker.json tasks are one-to-one with rtl_todo_plan.json tasks
Every dynamic tracker task starts pending in a fresh run; audit pass/fail is preserved in detail/criteria, not pre-approved
Every task count/category in the plan was reviewed
rtl_gate.rtl_gen tasks are present for SSOT authority, workflow TODO format, owner traceability, static RTL evidence, DUT compile, DUT-only lint, and dynamic TODO closure
Blocking questions and orphan tasks are resolved through SSOT, not bypassed
The UI TODO list follows the dynamic tracker file, not this seed template

tasks.content: [SSOT->RTL] Execute every required dynamic implementation task
tasks.detail: For each required task in rtl_todo_plan.json, implement or repair the owning RTL behavior until the task's content/detail/criteria are satisfied. Cover function_model transactions, state variables, outputs, side effects, invariants, cycle_model latency/handshake/pipeline/ordering/backpressure, registers and fields, memory, interrupts, FSM, features, dataflow, error/security/debug/integration behavior, and every SSOT-authored workflow_todos.rtl-gen item. Implement only behavior explicitly present in SSOT. Parameterize user-tunable input/output shape when SSOT allows it: data width, address width, input/output channel count, lane count, FIFO depth, and similar dimensions should be top-level parameters or named localparams instead of scattered literals. Use the conventional explicit FSM style by default, but follow any SSOT/user-specified synthesizable FSM style override. Prefer exact shift-based arithmetic for multiplication/division: powers of two use << / >>, exact constant scaling may use shift-add/subtract, and general * or / requires explicit SSOT justification. Add clean intent comments for non-obvious FSM, CSR, datapath, arithmetic, parameters, and TBD regions so reviewers understand the meaning and reason for the RTL. If a required fact is absent or vague, mark that item TBD (missing in SSOT), do not infer RTL behavior, and report the exact SSOT field to ssot-gen.
tasks.criteria:
Every required dynamic task has todo_completion.status=pass after audit
Every required rtl_gate.rtl_gen task has todo_completion.status=pass after audit
Every workflow_todos.rtl-gen content/detail/criteria item is represented in rtl_todo_plan.json and implemented
Every task owner_file/owner_module is respected
Static RTL evidence is not satisfied by comments: derive_rtl_todos.py strips SystemVerilog comments before matching, so evidence_terms must remain as live lint-clean RTL identifiers, declarations, or expressions in the owner_file
Static RTL evidence is not satisfied by evidence-only alias/dummy wires; matched identifiers must participate in real control, datapath, CSR, FSM, CDC, or IO behavior
User-tunable input/output widths, channel counts, lane counts, depths, and address widths are parameterized or centralized in named localparams according to SSOT authority
Port declarations, internal signals, masks, counters, and slices consistently use those parameters/localparams instead of scattered magic widths
FSMs use the conventional explicit state-register plus next-state/output-decode structure by default, unless SSOT/user specifies another synthesizable style
Each user-facing parameter has a short comment explaining what changes when overridden
Exact power-of-two multiply/divide operations use shift operators instead of * or /
Any remaining * or / operator has explicit SSOT justification or a documented non-shift-equivalent reason
Optimized arithmetic comments explain equivalence plus width/rounding/signedness behavior
Non-obvious FSM, CSR, datapath, parameter, and TBD comments explain meaning/intent, not syntax
No function_model, cycle_model, register, dataflow, or FSM task is left orphaned
No LLM-authored RTL relies on placeholder tie-offs, comments, heartbeat/alive-only logic, model-only behavior, or inferred behavior absent from SSOT
Any TBD item is reported via [SSOT TBD REPORT] -> ssot-gen and blocks PASS until SSOT is enriched

tasks.content: [SSOT->RTL] Prove semantic traceability before compile/lint approval
tasks.detail: Run the dynamic RTL audit so <ip>/rtl/rtl_traceability.json and <ip>/rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json show gate.status=pass after RTL exists. Missing static evidence means the implementation is not approved even if compile/lint is clean.
tasks.criteria:
rtl_traceability.json exists
rtl_todo_plan.json gate.status is pass after --audit-rtl
Every rtl_gate.rtl_gen task has todo_completion.status=pass
blocking_questions=0
orphan_tasks=0
static_missing=0
open_required_todos=0
all_required_todos_pass=true

tasks.content: [SSOT->RTL] Run DUT-only compile and lint after the final RTL edit
tasks.detail: Run the common stage engine or canonical scripts from the project root. Compile and lint are necessary but not sufficient: they must be paired with the dynamic SSOT TODO gate.
tasks.criteria:
Final compile command ran after the last RTL edit
Final DUT-only lint command ran after the last RTL edit
No error/fatal/warning/sorry diagnostics remain unless the exact waiver is in SSOT coding_rules
Filelist contains every required RTL source and no stale source

tasks.content: [SSOT->RTL] Report pass, repair, or SSOT question with evidence
tasks.detail: Report exact artifacts and gate state. PASS requires dynamic TODO gate pass, manifest approval, compile pass, lint pass, and SSOT TBD REPORT: none. If the gate fails, repair RTL or send a precise [SSOT QUESTION] / [SSOT TBD REPORT] to ssot-gen. Do not claim sim, coverage, or signoff success from rtl-gen.
tasks.criteria:
Report includes rtl_todo_plan.json, rtl_traceability.json, rtl_compile.json, dut_lint.json, and filelist paths
PASS is claimed only when every gate is green and SSOT TBD REPORT is none
Repair path names failed dynamic task IDs/source_refs
Blocked path names missing SSOT fields and owner workflow
Blocked report lists exact yaml_path, needed_for, question, and current_rtl_action: TBD — not implemented
Next workflow is tb-gen after RTL gate pass
